summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Love Letters website iteration 3. Backend APIs working perfectly (12/12 tests passed) including new security headers and rate limiting. Frontend testing shows most iteration 3 changes successfully implemented, with code splitting, API service layer, and basic checkout functionality working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Loading state improvements not fully implemented - loading spinner not visible, form inputs and button not disabled during submission
Error display area not found with data-testid selector, though error messages do appear

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Products API returning 17 products as expected
Security headers properly implemented (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection)
Admin login rate limiting working correctly (returns 429 after 5 failed attempts)
Home page hero section with headline, subtitle, and CTA all visible above the fold
Shop page 4-column grid layout confirmed for desktop (lg:grid-cols-4)
Product detail page navigation working correctly
Contact page typewriter image visible and transparent (opacity 0.75)
Contact form submission working with success message display
Dark mode toggle working correctly (changes HTML class from 'light' to 'dark')
Code splitting with React.lazy working - all routes (Shop, Contact, Cart, Home) load successfully
API service layer working - products and contact form use API correctly
Checkout page loads and displays form correctly
Checkout error display functionality working (shows error messages)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix checkout loading state implementation: ensure loading spinner is visible, form inputs and submit button are disabled during submission, and error display area has proper data-testid attribute

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (17/19 tests passed - 2 minor checkout loading state issues)
